title: User Guides - App Settings Menu > User Guide
scenario: User Guides section in Poly Studio Mobile app displays split list of Onboarding and User Guides with "Other devices" support link
steps: Tap Menu (hamburger icon) or Settings gear icon
expected: User Guides page opens displaying a list of supported devices with images. The list is split into two sections: Onboarding guides for Free 20 / Free 60 / Free 60+, and User Guides for all other devices. At the bottom, a "Not seeing your device?" message with an "Other devices" button is visible. A back button is present in the top left corner. Tapping "Other devices" opens the Poly support web page. Tapping the back button returns to App Settings.
